title: abutilon fraseri subsp. diplotrichum
intro: Abutilon fraseri subsp. diplotrichum, also known as the Australian flowering maple, is a plant species native to Australia and is characterized by its maple-like leaves and showy bell-shaped flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Abutilon fraseri subsp. diplotrichum are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
